title: Xtra Smoky Jamaican Chicken Skewers
description: A smoky and flavorful Jamaican dish featuring chicken skewers, perfect for kids and adults alike, with a low calorie count and a unique ice bath shocking step to lock in moisture, served on a wooden board.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together colatura, brown sugar, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto the soaked wooden skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through to an internal temperature of 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
Immediately after grilling, submerge the skewers in an ice bath to stop the cooking process and lock in moisture.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving on a wooden board.
